issue_title: FLATTENED-related tests failing in release mode
issue_body:
### CI Link

https://gradle-enterprise.elastic.co/s/qswdvrbrh4e3w/tests/overview?outcome=FAILED

### Repro line

```text
too many to list
```

### Does it reproduce?

Yes

### Applicable branches

main

### Failure history

_No response_

### Failure excerpt

`org.elasticsearch.xpack.esql.core.QlIllegalArgumentException: remote node at version [9383000] doesn't understand data type [FLATTENED]	` but there are also other symptoms.
commit_message:
ESQL: Skip flattened tests in release mode (#148978)

Skip `flattened` tests in release mode. They aren't released and won't
pass.

Close #148960
